item.title: 亲身体验：苹果新款iPhone 17e及其他新品
item.description: 苹果公司本周发布了一系列新品，包括售价599美元的MacBook Neo——这是该公司首款真正意义上的低端笔记本电脑——以及iPhone 17e。该公司还宣布了MacBook Pro、MacBook Air、Studio Display和iPad Air的更新版本。【原文：Apple Inc. this week unveiled a slate of new products, including the $599 MacBook Neo — its first true low-end laptop — and the iPhone 17e. The company also announced updated versions of the MacBook Pro, MacBook Air, Studio Display and iPad Air.】

item.title: 霍尔木兹海峡封锁致中东地区石油储备迅速填满
item.description: 中东地区的石油生产商正面临紧张倒计时，伊朗战争阻断了该地区的主要出口通道，导致各国储油罐满溢，若局势持续将威胁减产。【原文：Oil producers across the Middle East face a tense countdown as the Iran war blocks the region’s main export artery, filling the countries’ storage tanks and threatening output cuts if the situation persists.】

item.title: 美联储调查显示：2025年企业缩减薪资支出，医疗成本却大幅攀升
item.description: 根据纽约联邦储备银行最近的一项调查，2025年企业面临着近年来最剧烈的成本上涨，昂贵的医疗保险迫使企业降低薪资涨幅。【原文：Businesses faced some of the sharpest cost increases in recent years in 2025, as more expensive health insurance prompted firms to hand out smaller pay increases, according to a recent survey by the Federal Reserve Bank of New York.】

item.title: 马斯克将就推特投资者指控其欺诈案出庭作证
item.description: 埃隆·马斯克将于周三在陪审团审判中出庭作证，该案指控其在2022年试图回购社交网络公司推特时，通过公开推文操纵该公司股价以谋取更有利的收购条件。【原文：Elon Musk is slated to testify Wednesday in a jury trial over allegations that he manipulated Twitter Inc.’s stock price with his public tweets to try to get himself a better deal to buy the social network back in 2022.】

item.title: 美国服务业活动因需求增长创2022年以来最大增幅
item.description: 美国服务业经济在2月份以2022年中期以来最快的速度扩张，强劲的订单增长和商业活动推动了这一增长。【原文：The US service economy expanded in February at the fastest pace since mid-2022, powered by robust orders growth and business activity.】

item.title: 苹果推出599美元MacBook Neo，威胁Windows个人电脑市场
item.description: 苹果公司推出售价599美元的MacBook Neo，这是该公司迄今为止在低端笔记本电脑领域最大规模的扩张举措，旨在争夺注重预算的消费者市场，与Windows个人电脑和Chromebook展开竞争。【原文：Apple Inc. rolled out the $599 MacBook Neo in its biggest push yet into low-end laptops, aiming to challenge Windows PCs and Chromebooks for budget-minded shoppers.】

item.title: 伊朗战争扰乱中东出口，喷气燃料价格飙升
item.description: 随着石油交易商应对伊朗战争的余波，全球航空燃油价格正持续飙升，加剧了人们对全球通胀的广泛担忧。【原文：Jet fuel prices are soaring around the world as oil traders grapple with the fallout of the Iran war, adding to wider concerns about global inflation.】

item.title: 谷歌Gemini被指教唆佛罗里达男子自杀
item.description: 谷歌正面临佛罗里达州一名36岁男子家属的诉讼。该男子据称在该公司Gemini聊天机器人的影响下，曾考虑实施"大规模伤亡袭击"，最终自杀身亡。【原文：Google is facing a lawsuit from the family of a 36-year-old Florida man who allegedly considered carrying out a “mass casualty attack” and ultimately killed himself under the influence of the company’s Gemini chatbot.】

item.title: 美联储官员米兰称尽管伊朗战争爆发仍希望降息
item.description: 美联储理事斯蒂芬·米兰表示，鉴于目前判断中东战争对美国经济的影响为时尚早，他认为继续降息仍是恰当之举。【原文：Federal Reserve Governor Stephen Miran said he thinks it’s still appropriate to continue cutting interest rates given that it’s too early to take a stance on the impact of war in the Middle East on the US economy.】

item.title: 赫格塞特吹嘘对伊朗军方发动"历史性"行动
item.description: 国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯表示，随着伊朗防空系统被摧毁，美以两国即将全面掌控伊朗领空，他同时阐述了加深对伊朗境内目标打击的计划。【原文：Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said the US and Israel are on the cusp of taking complete control of Iran’s airspace as he laid out plans to step up attacks deeper in the country as its defenses are destroyed.】

item.title: 海湾地区航空公司正经历"最糟糕的局面"
item.description: 每家航空公司都有应急预案来应对极端天气或机械故障造成的航班中断，但中东地区的航空公司总会在清单上额外添加一项：战争。【原文：Every airline has contingency plans to manage disruptions from extreme weather or mechanical failures, but those based in the Middle East always have another item on their list: war.】

item.title: 索尼退出PC平台的PlayStation游戏业务
item.description:
这家电子游戏发行商不再计划推出《羊蹄山幽灵》等PlayStation游戏的PC移植版。

【原文：

The video-game publisher no longer plans to put out PC ports of PlayStation games such as ‘Ghost of Yotei’

】

item.title: 欧盟领导人将呼吁采取措施降低电价
item.description: 欧盟领导人将在本月晚些时候的峰会上指示该集团的执行机构提出降低电价的措施，以帮助当地产业。【原文：European Union leaders will direct the bloc’s executive arm to propose measures to lower power prices to aid local industries when they meet at a summit later this month.】

item.title: 俄油价仍低廉 战火威胁全球供应之际
item.description: 尽管中东局势持续升级推动全球油价上涨，俄罗斯旗舰原油混合品种仍以大幅折扣价交易。【原文：Russia’s flagship crude blend is still trading at deep discounts despite a global oil rally driven by the growing escalation in the Middle East.】

item.title: ADP数据显示，美国企业2月份新增6.3万个就业岗位
item.description: 美国企业上月新增就业岗位数创去年七月以来新高，进一步印证劳动力市场已出现一定程度的稳定。【原文：US companies added the most jobs since July last month, adding to evidence of some stabilization in the labor market.】

item.title: 交易员关注乌克兰冲突以评估伊朗市场风险
item.description: 伊朗局势持续时间的不确定性正迫使投资者以近期历史作为市场走势的参考依据。【原文：Uncertainty about how long the conflict in Iran could last is forcing investors to look to recent history as a guide for markets.】

item.title: 股指期货涨幅全数回吐，贝森特释放关税即将实施的信号
item.description: 特朗普政府暗示对全球进口商品征收15%关税的政策可能于本周生效，导致股市期货回吐早盘涨幅。此举可能进一步扰乱本已因伊朗战争余波而动荡的市场。【原文：Stock futures erased earlier gains after the Trump administration signaled that global 15% tariff on US imports would likely take effect this week, adding a further potential disruption to markets already in flux over the fallout of the war in Iran.】

item.title: 霍尔木兹海峡的船队无法一夜之间解决关键的石油和天然气供应问题
item.description: 美军护航需求迫在眉睫，但最终是否出航仍由船长决定。【原文：US military escorts are urgently needed, but it’s ultimately the ship captains who decide whether to sail.】

item.title: 伊朗78亿美元加密货币市场在战争中引发新关注
item.description: 美以两国对伊朗的战争正重新聚焦该国价值78亿美元的加密货币市场。在动荡时期，伊朗民众和当局越来越多地转向该市场来存储和转移资金。【原文：The US-Israeli war on Iran is putting renewed focus on the country’s $7.8 billion cryptocurrency market, which citizens and authorities there have increasingly turned to for storing and sending money during periods of turmoil.】

item.title: 梅西的迈阿密国际队与巴西金融科技公司Nu达成体育场合作协议
item.description: 迈阿密国际足球俱乐部——超级巨星莱昂内尔·梅西的东家——与Nu Holdings达成协议，将球队新球场的冠名权及标志性粉色球衣的广告位授予这家金融科技巨头。【原文：Inter Miami CF, the home of superstar Lionel Messi, signed a deal with Nu Holdings that gives the financial technology behemoth naming rights for the team’s new stadium and space on its famous pink jerseys.】

item.title: 彭博投资峰会最新动态
item.description: 2026年3月3日周二，美国纽约彭博投资大会现场标识。本次会议汇聚了资产管理、银行业、私募资本及财富管理领域最具影响力的行业领袖。摄影师：迈克尔·纳格尔/彭博社【原文：Signage during the Bloomberg Invest event in New York, US, on Tuesday, March 3, 2026. The conference brings together the most influential voices across asset management, banking, private capital and wealth. Photographer: Michael Nagle/Bloomberg】

item.title: 与南非解放英雄相关的葡萄酒庄园即将出售
item.description: 一座与前政界人士兼反种族隔离活动家有关联的南非历史悠久的葡萄酒庄园将于本月拍卖，经纪人寻求的竞标价至少为1.8亿兰特（1100万美元）。【原文：A historic South African wine farm linked to a former politician and anti-apartheid activist is set for auction this month, with brokers seeking bids of at least 180 million rand ($11 million).】

item.title: 股灾重创韩国杠杆押注，引发恐慌蔓延
item.description: 周三下午，韩国股市暴跌，恐慌情绪蔓延至首尔金融区。在未来资产证券位于市中心的小型办公室里，大批客户争相排队取钱。【原文：As South Korean stocks crashed Wednesday afternoon, panic spread through Seoul’s financial district. At the small downtown office of Mirae Asset Securities, scores of clients hurriedly lined up to get their money out.】

item.title: 贝森特称特朗普本周可能将关税上调至15%
item.description: 财政部长斯科特·贝森特表示，特朗普总统将普遍关税从10%提高至15%的计划很可能在本周实施。【原文：Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said that President Donald Trump’s plan to increase a 10% universal tariff up to 15% will likely be done this week.】

item.title: 阿根廷金融科技公司Ualá在新一轮融资中估值达32亿美元
item.description: 阿根廷金融科技公司Ualá宣布完成1.95亿美元股权融资，本轮融资由德国保险巨头安联集团旗下风险投资部门Allianz X领投，公司估值达32亿美元。【原文：Argentine fintech Ualá said it has raised $195 million in an equity funding round led by Allianz X, the venture capital arm of Germany’s insurance giant Allianz SE, that values the company at $3.2 billion.】

item.title: 人类与五角大楼的争议引发战场人工智能边界之争
item.description: 人工智能控制的武器，自主性达到什么程度才算过头？【原文：How much autonomy is too much for weapons directed by AI?】

item.title: 预测市场推出新型战争押注，超越华盛顿掌控范围
item.description: 自上周六以来，Polymarket已推出十余项与伊朗冲突相关的全新合约，包括押注政权更迭及胡塞武装袭击以色列等事件，地缘政治类投注量创下历史新高。【原文：Polymarket opened more than a dozen new contracts tied to the Iran conflict since Saturday, including bets on regime change and Houthi strikes on Israel, as geopolitical wagers hit a record.】

item.title: 中国寄望于消费者推动下一阶段的经济增长
item.description: 彭博经济研究预计，到2030年消费将上升至占国内生产总值的46%。【原文：Bloomberg Economics sees consumption rising to make up 46% of GDP by 2030】

item.title: 特朗普猛烈抨击西班牙，威胁实施贸易禁运
item.description: 西班牙官员予以斥责，称他必须遵守国际贸易规则。【原文：Spanish officials issued a rebuke, saying he must follow the rules of international trade】

item.title: 电价飙升迫使美国政界人士寻求解决方案
item.description: 美国政界人士正争相采取措施控制电价飙升，这场能源危机可能颠覆今年的国会选举格局。【原文：US politicians are scrambling to tame the soaring cost of electricity that threatens to upend this year’s congressional elections.】
